message:
🌱 Add opencost: Make namespace annotations/labels available when mission (#1338)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opencost-1223-make-namespace-annotations-labels-available-when-aggregating-by-na",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opencost: Make namespace annotations/labels available when aggregating by namespace",
+    "description": "Make namespace annotations/labels available when aggregating by namespace. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opencost deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opencost version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nhelm list -n opencost 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opencost installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opencost configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost\n```\nWhen using the allocations API you should be able to aggregate by namespace and specify explicitly the annotations/labels you want to be included in the properties field."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Make namespace annotations/labels available when…",
+        "description": "## What does this PR change?\n* This PR implements returning NamespaceLabels and Namespace Annotations in the AllocationProperties object. This allows for separate treatment of the namespace labels/annotations in an Allocation, and avoids having those get clobbered by pod labels/annotations\n\n## How will this PR impact users?\n* Existing functionality is unaffected, the labels/annotations fields continue to use the old logic. \n\n## Does this PR address any GitHub or Zendesk issues?\n* Implementation\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Make namespace annotations/labels available when…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## What does this PR change?\n* This PR implements returning NamespaceLabels and Namespace Annotations in the AllocationProperties object.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+    ],

+    ],
